cellClick.script:
var e=arguments[1]||{};var row=e.row||{};var col=e.column||{};var prop=col.property||col.prop||'';var map={viewAction:'\u67e5\u770b',scoreAction:'\u8bc4\u5206',editAction:'\u7f16\u8f91',moreAction:'\u66f4\u591a'};if(map[prop]){var doc=document;var old=doc.getElementById('pal-table-action-feedback');if(old&&old.parentNode)old.parentNode.removeChild(old);var box=doc.createElement('div');box.id='pal-table-action-feedback';box.style.cssText='position:fixed;right:28px;top:24px;z-index:999999;background:#0f172a;color:#fff;border-radius:4px;padding:10px 14px;font-size:14px;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(15,23,42,.22);';box.textContent=map[prop]+'?'+(row.name||'')+' '+(row.studentId||'');doc.body.appendChild(box);window.__palLastTableAction={action:map[prop],prop:prop,name:row.name,studentId:row.studentId,time:Date.now()};if(prop==='moreAction'){var menu=doc.createElement('div');menu.id='pal-table-action-more-menu';menu.style.cssText='position:fixed;right:28px;top:70px;z-index:999999;background:#fff;border:1px solid #d6dfeb;border-radius:4px;box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.18);overflow:hidden;color:#1f2937;font-size:14px;';menu.innerHTML='
????

';doc.body.appendChild(menu);}setTimeout(function(){var b=doc.getElementById('pal-table-action-feedback');if(b&&b.parentNode)b.parentNode.removeChild(b);},2200);}
